rationale: Improvement to cyrus-sasl error message/build detection for GSSAPI; build/error reporting, no spec rule violated.

Documentation improvement for configuration options; docs only, no spec or behavior change.
Documentation and thread-safety clarification for mongoc_client_pool; docs/minor internal safety, no spec rule.
Documentation improvement for mongoc_init/cleanup lifecycle; docs only, no spec involvement.
Spec forbids readConcern in getMore; driver appended it, causing server error 'Unrecognized field readConcern'.
Internal handshake bitmask not updated after adding configure flags; internal build detail, no spec rule.
Proactive deprecation of mongoc_collection_save for CRUD spec alignment; not a current violation, just an improvement.
Inconsistent internal BSON validation logic in update path; no specific spec rule named as violated.
Documentation of maxAwaitTimeMS for find; docs only, no behavior change.
Segfault in mongoc_client_get_gridfs when connection fails; memory safety crash, no specific spec rule violated.
Autotools may skip substitution of MONGOC_HAVE_SOCKLEN; build system issue, no spec involvement.
Misplaced ifdef guard in SSPI source file causing build error; build system issue, no spec involvement.
Ticket is to implement Connection String Spec Tests in the C driver; test infrastructure work.
Documentation of undocumented URI options; docs only, no behavior change.
Test skipping fix for offline environments; CI/test hygiene, not spec-related driver behavior.
Internal utility function bson_ascii_strcasecmp creation; internal refactor, no spec rule.

SDAM spec defines connectTimeoutMS as per-server; driver incorrectly applied it to entire mongoc_async_run call.
BSON spec requires regex options sorted alphabetically; libbson passed them through unsorted without validation.
Description says NaN/Infinity encoding 'likely violates the Extended JSON Spec'; platform-dependent encoding breaks spec.
Raising BSON_MAX_RECURSION internal limit; implementation tuning, no spec rule mandates a specific depth.
Race condition assertion failure in topology scanner between handshake and background thread; implementation concurrency bug, no spec rule violated.
Compiler warnings in test-bson.c; build hygiene, no spec or behavior change.
Server selection spec requires localThresholdMS default 15ms; driver defined MONGOC_TOPOLOGY_LOCAL_THRESHOLD_MS as 15000 (15 seconds).
Server selection spec says localThresholdMS=0 selects lowest RTT; mongoc_uri_get_option_as_int32 ignores zero, returns fallback 15ms.
Server selection spec implies localThresholdMS must be non-negative; driver lacks validation for this URI option.
Memory leak in test harness code (test_server_removed_during_handshake); test code resource leak, no spec rule.
Invalid memory read in libbson-release valgrind run; memory safety bug in iterator fuzz test, no spec rule.
Man page generation bug includes all pages in bson_api.3; docs/build artifact issue, no spec involvement.
Segfault destroying cursor after invalid opts error; implementation crash bug, no specific spec rule violated.
CI coverage/scan-build upload failure due to permission errors; CI infrastructure issue, no spec involvement.
Windows static build linker failure with unresolved __imp_ symbols since 1.5.0; build/packaging regression, no spec rule.
Connection string spec defines component order; database parsing starts before host list end, overlapping host for Unix socket URIs.
Linker error: undefined reference to assert due to missing include; build issue, no spec involvement.
Silent NULL return on invalid percent-encoding; API ergonomics/error reporting improvement, not a spec behavioral violation.
Autotools socket param type detection for HP-UX; build/porting issue, no spec rule violated.

Improvement to return bson_error_t from URI parsing for better error messages; API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.

Test failure on zSeries Ubuntu without OpenSSL; insufficient detail, likely CI/environment issue.
